violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Working containers of salt observed not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
A ceiling tile is missing in the front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
